name: Cream of Green Chile Soup
recipeIngredient: 12 Ounces Tub Bueno Green Chiles (Mild, Hot, or X-Hot)
2 Cups Monterey Jack Cheese (grated) - or mozzarella cheese, or a combination of both
recipeInstructions:
Preferably use 1 yellow cornmeal and 1 blue.
Use mozzarella cheese, or a combination of mozzarella and/or other cheeses such as Muenster or Asiago.
1. Cut the tortillas into 1/4 inch wide strips. Leave them uncovered at room temperature until they are dry and crisp, about 24 hours (or heat in an iron skillet until dry and hot).
2. In a 4-quart saucepan over low heat, melt the butter. Add the onions, garlic, oregano, and bay leaves. Cook, covered, stirring once or twice, for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the chicken broth, potatoes, salt, cumin, black pepper, and green chiles. Bring to a boil. Lower the heat and simmer, partially covered, stirring once or twice, until the potatoes are very tender, about 25 minutes.
4. Stir in the whipping cream and adjust the seasoning if necessary. The soup can be prepared up to 3 days ahead. Cool it completely and refrigerate, covered. Rewarm it over low heat, stirring often, until steaming.
5. Ladle the soup into wide bowls. Sprinkle the cheese over the soup and scatter the tortilla strips over the cheese. Serve immediately.
Serves 4 to 6.
